description_long: This object is a stylized rifle resembling the iconic AK-47, featuring a metallic body with a curved magazine and a wooden foregrip. The receiver and barrel are rendered in a matte gray, giving the weapon a utilitarian appearance. The stock and pistol grip are blocky and angular, with the stock appearing to be a simple, fixed design. The magazine is distinctly curved, typical of rifles designed for intermediate cartridges, and is attached just ahead of the trigger guard. The foregrip and handguard are colored in a dark brown, suggesting a wood or polymer material. The muzzle is plain, with no visible attachments, and the sighting system appears to be a basic iron sight.
description: A stylized, metallic rifle with a curved magazine, wooden foregrip, and fixed stock, resembling an AK-47. The finish is matte gray with dark brown accents.
description_view_0: Side view showing the full length of the rifle, curved magazine, and wooden foregrip.
description_view_1: Front view highlighting the barrel opening and the alignment of the iron sights.
description_view_2: Opposite side view displaying the magazine curve and the blocky stock and grip.
description_view_3: Rear view focusing on the end of the stock and the back of the receiver.
